subject: Action Required: Your linked bank account has been declined
body: Dear User, We attempted to process a payment of $156.00 to your vendor, but your linked bank account (ending in 8821) was declined by the issuing bank. This may result in late fees or service interruption. Please update your payment method within 48 hours to avoid account restrictions. Transaction ID: PP-20260611-8847.

subject: [CRITICAL] Redis cluster unreachable - cache failures at 100%
body:
ALERT TYPE: CRITICAL
Service: Redis Production Cluster
Status: UNREACHABLE
Started: 2026-06-11T08:12:33Z
Duration: 14 minutes
Impact: All cache lookups failing, fallback to database causing 8x latency increase
Error rate: 100% of cache operations
Affected hosts: redis-prod-01, redis-prod-02, redis-prod-03
PagerDuty incident triggered. On-call engineer notified.

subject: Re: Invoice dispute - $45,000 overcharged for Q1 services
body: Hi Finance Team, I'm writing to formally dispute Invoice #INV-2026-Q1-0342 for $45,230. Our records show we were only contracted for $32,000 worth of services in Q1. We have been overcharged by $13,230. I've attached our signed contract and usage logs as evidence. Please issue a credit note within 5 business days or we will escalate this to our legal department. This is the second billing error in three months and it's becoming a serious concern.

subject: This week in AI: GPT-5 rumors, new open-source models, and more
body: Hey there! This week's top stories: 1) OpenAI hints at GPT-5 release, 2) Meta releases Llama 4 open weights, 3) EU AI Act enforcement begins, 4) Startup raises $200M for AI chips. Read all 12 stories on our website. Don't miss next week's edition! Unsubscribe

subject: URGENT: SSL certificate expires in 48 hours - immediate renewal required
body:
CRITICAL SECURITY NOTICE
Domain: api.yourdomain.com
Certificate Type: Wildcard SSL
Expiration: 2026-06-13T23:59:59Z (48 hours)
Issuer: Let's Encrypt
If not renewed, all HTTPS traffic will fail with security warnings, and API clients will reject connections. Auto-renewal failed due to DNS validation error. Manual intervention required immediately.

subject: Feature request: Multi-language support for our EU customers
body: Hello Product Team, As we expand our operations across Europe, we urgently need multi-language support for the dashboard. Our customers in Germany, France, and Poland are requesting localized interfaces. This is blocking our Q3 expansion plans. Can we schedule a call to discuss timeline and pricing for this feature? We're willing to pay for priority development. Best regards, Anna

body: Your Heroku bill for the billing period May 1-31, 2026 is ready. Total: $892.45. Breakdown: Dyno hours: $540, Postgres: $200, Redis: $100, Add-ons: $52.45. Payment will be charged to your card ending in 5566 on June 15, 2026. View detailed bill in dashboard.

subject: Pod CrashLoopBackOff detected in production namespace
body:
WARNING: Multiple pods in CrashLoopBackOff state detected.
Namespace: production
Deployment: payment-service
Failed pods: 3/5
Restart count: 47 in last hour
Last error: OutOfMemoryError - Java heap space
Node: worker-node-07
Resource limits: 2Gi memory (currently using 2.1Gi)
Recommendation: Increase memory limit or fix memory leak in application code.

subject: You have 12 new followers this week
body: Hi! You gained 12 new followers this week. Your most popular tweet got 234 likes. Check out your weekly analytics and see what's trending in your network. Manage notifications

subject: Formal investigation notice - GDPR Article 30 compliance review
body:
NOTICE OF INVESTIGATION
Reference: GDPR-2026-EU-4471
Company: Your Company Ltd
Subject: Formal investigation into compliance with GDPR Article 30 (Records of processing activities)
Deadline for response: 30 days from receipt
Required documentation: Data processing records, DPO contact details, privacy impact assessments
Failure to comply may result in administrative fines up to €10 million or 2% of global annual turnover. Legal counsel should be consulted immediately.

subject: Your Zoom Pro subscription expires in 7 days
body: Hi there, Your Zoom Pro subscription will expire on June 18, 2026. After expiration, your account will revert to the Basic plan with a 40-minute meeting limit. To continue enjoying unlimited meetings, cloud recording, and advanced features, please renew your subscription. Current price: $13.33/month billed annually. Renew now

subject: FURIOUS: Third time my data was lost - demanding immediate compensation
body: To Whom It May Concern, This is absolutely unacceptable! For the THIRD time this quarter, my exported data has been lost due to your system errors. I've spent countless hours recreating reports that your platform was supposed to safeguard. I demand: 1) Full refund for the past 3 months ($450), 2) Written apology from your CEO, 3) Guarantee this won't happen again with SLA penalties. If this is not resolved within 24 hours, I will: - Terminate my contract immediately - Post negative reviews on G2 and Capterra - Report to consumer protection agencies I expect your response by tomorrow 5 PM CET.

subject: Top stories from Hacker News this week
body: This week's top stories: 1) Show HN: I built a privacy-focused email client, 2) Why Rust is winning the systems programming war, 3) The hidden costs of microservices, 4) How we scaled to 1M users with $0 marketing budget. Read more at hackernewsletter.com. Unsubscribe

subject: Vulnerability detected in your repository dependencies
body:
SECURITY ALERT
Repository: your-org/main-api
Severity: HIGH
Vulnerability: CVE-2026-1847 - Remote Code Execution
Affected package: lodash@4.17.20
Fixed version: lodash@4.17.21
Impact: Attackers can execute arbitrary code on your server
Dependabot has created a security patch. Please review and merge immediately. View details: github.com/your-org/main-api/security

subject: Reminder: Submit your timesheets by Friday 5 PM
body: Hi Team, This is a friendly reminder to submit your weekly timesheets by Friday 5:00 PM. Late submissions may delay payroll processing. If you have any issues, contact hr@company.com. Thank you!

subject: Unusual API usage spike detected - potential unauthorized access
body:
SECURITY NOTICE: We detected unusual API usage on your account.
Account: your-org
Time period: Last 24 hours
Tokens consumed: 12.5M (normal: 500K)
Spend: $187.50 (normal: $7.50)
Increase: 2,400% above baseline
Suspicious patterns: Multiple API keys used from unknown IP addresses
If this was not authorized, immediately: 1) Rotate all API keys, 2) Enable IP restrictions, 3) Contact support@openai.com. We've temporarily rate-limited your account to prevent further charges.

body: Join us at Salesforce Connections+ 2026! Dates: September 15-17, 2026. Location: Moscone Center, San Francisco. Learn about the latest AI innovations, network with industry leaders, and discover how to transform your business. Early bird registration: $799 (regular $1,299). Register now and save $500!

subject: Cluster health RED - primary shards unassigned
body:
CRITICAL ALERT
Cluster: prod-logs-cluster
Status: RED
Unassigned shards: 12 primary, 24 replica
Cause: Node elasticsearch-prod-03 ran out of disk space (95% used)
Impact: Search queries failing, log ingestion halted
Affected indices: logs-2026.06.11, logs-2026.06.10
Immediate action required: 1) Free up disk space on elasticsearch-prod-03, 2) Expand storage capacity, 3) Reallocate shards. Estimated recovery time after disk cleanup: 45 minutes.

subject: Contract renewal discussion - requesting 15% discount for 3-year commitment
body: Dear Sales Team, Our current enterprise contract expires on August 31, 2026. We've been very satisfied with your platform and would like to renew for a 3-year term. However, given our loyalty and the volume of our usage (500+ users), we request a 15% discount on the standard enterprise pricing. We're also evaluating your competitors who have offered us significant discounts. Can we schedule a meeting next week to discuss? We need a decision by July 15 to align with our budget planning. Cordialement, Sophie Laurent, CTO
